location: Sold by Patches once he sets up his merchant stall inside Murkwater Cave in Limgrave after surrendering mid-fight; also purchasable later from the Twin Maiden Husks at Roundtable Hold once you obtain Patches' Bell Bearing.
tactics: Fight Patches in Murkwater Cave; once he drops to roughly half health he'll beg for mercy — accept, and he opens a shop right there in the cave.
If you kill him instead (or otherwise obtain his Bell Bearing), his full stock including this dagger becomes purchasable from the Twin Maiden Husks at Roundtable Hold.
Its innate Parry skill makes it worth grabbing early even outside a dagger build, just as a dedicated parry tool.
lore: A knife fitted with curved handguards, built specifically to catch and turn aside an incoming blow — rewarding a duelist who can read and counter an opponent's strike rather than simply out-trade them.

builds.name: Dedicated parry build
builds.why: Its default Parry skill offers a faster, more forgiving window than the standard small-shield parry, making it a top pick for a punish-focused riposte build.

builds.name: Pure Dex quality poke
builds.why: C Dexterity scaling and low requirements (5/14) let it double as a cheap early dex weapon outside of its parry gimmick.
